{{Quote|Sorry. Bureaucracy. Normally I could pull some strings and solve a little problem like this in a flash. But it's Fun World Founder's Day. Government offices here shut their doors early today. Everyone's gone home.|Lando Calrissian explaining to Leia Organa and Han Solo why their marriage would need to be delayed|<ref name="QotE" />}}
'''Fun World Founder's Day''' was a holiday on the [[amusement park]]–[[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Hologram Fun World]]. Government offices closed early in observance of the holiday.<ref name="QotE" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] tried to get [[Marriage/Legends|married]] on Hologram Fun World. When their host, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], informed the couple that they needed their [[birth certificate]]s for the marriage to be legal, Organa and Solo admitted that they did not have the documents with them. Calrissian promised to print up duplicates in the station's [[Document Bureau]], but due to the observance of Fun World Founder's Day, the office was closed and the printing had to wait until the following day.<ref name="QotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fun World Founder's Day is mentioned in the [[1993]] young-adult novel ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'', written by [[Paul Davids]] and [[Hollace Davids]].<ref name="QotE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
